info.title: ProArc REST API
info.description: OpenAPI dokumentace pro ProArc REST API v2. REST v1 je deprecated a neni zde dokumentovane.

servers.description: REST API base path relative to this OpenAPI document

proarcLogin.description: Enter ProArc username and password. Swagger UI uses these credentials to call POST ../proarclogin and stores the returned JSESSIONID cookie in the browser.

cookieAuth.name: JSESSIONID
cookieAuth.description: Session cookie created by POST ../proarclogin with form fields j_username and j_password.
